name: Pork Medallions w/ Asian Glaze
recipeIngredient: 6 pork boneless loin or center-cut chops, about 1/2 pound (about 1-1/2 pounds)
1 tablespoon rice vinegar or white vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Don't limit the use of this flavorful glaze to pork. Try brushing it on chicken breasts or lean fish fillets when broiling.
2. Set oven control to broil.
3. Spray a shallow roasting pan with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Prepare the Asian Glaze by combining all ingredients in a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, for about 2 minutes.
5. Trim fat from pork chops.
6. Place pork in the pan and brush with half of the glaze.
7. Broil with tops 7 inches from heat for 5 minutes; turn.
8. Brush remaining glaze over pork.
9. Broil 5 to 6 minutes longer for medium doneness (160 degrees).
